en.extract:
The white-crowned starling (Lamprotornis albicapillus) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Djibouti, Ethiopia, Kenya, and Somalia.

The '''white-crowned starling''' ('''''Lamprotornis albicapillus''''') is a species of [[starling]] in the family [[Sturnidae]]. It is found in [[Djibouti]], [[Ethiopia]], [[Kenya]], and [[Somalia]].
